title: LSA Setup Per-Client Config
description: Configuration shape for the lsa-setup skill. One file per client at skills/lsa-setup/configs/lsa-config-<client_slug>.json. Zero hardcoded values in the skill engine — everything comes from this config.

client_slug.description: Matches the client slug used across the system (e.g., 'ev-electric-services').

business_name_exact.description: Exact legal business name. Must match the insurance certificate AND the LSA account name character-for-character. Mismatches cause verification rejection.

trade.description: LSA trade category (e.g., 'electrician', 'plumber', 'hvac', 'roofer', 'locksmith'). Must be in Google's supported LSA category list.

owner_name.description: Full legal name of the business owner. Used for background check.

owner_email.description: Google account email used for LSA signup. Should match the GBP owner account.

number.description: License number. Blank until operator gathers from client.

scope_notes.description: Any scope limitations (e.g., 'residential only'). Must match LSA categories selected.

expiry.description: Policy expiration date (YYYY-MM-DD). Track for renewal.

acord25_on_file.description: True when the ACORD-25 certificate has been collected.

business_name_matches.description: True when the name on the cert exactly matches business_name_exact.

technicians.description: Every technician who performs jobs under this LSA account. Each needs an individual background check, renewed annually.

background_check_status.description: Track per technician through the verification lifecycle.

background_check_date.description: Date background check was initiated or passed. Renewal due 12 months later.

verified.description: GBP must be verified before LSA setup can proceed (mandatory since Nov 2024).

profile_url.description: Google Maps URL for the business profile.

zip_codes.description: ZIP codes to target. TIGHT — off-area leads are not creditable since 2024.

description.description: Human-readable service area description for operator reference.

enabled.description: All LSA job-type categories to enable.

high_value.description: Subset of enabled — the premium job types to weight toward.

weekly_pacing.description: 'even' = Google distributes evenly across weeks. 'manual' = operator sets weekly caps.

who_answers.description: Who receives and responds to LSA leads.

target_seconds.description: Target response time in seconds. Google rewards fast responders.

hours.description: Business hours. Mirrors the client JSON hours shape.

lsa_account.description: Populated during Phase 3+. Not required at config creation time.
